description: Documentation dependency registry. Hand-editable source of truth. Read by pre-write-guard.sh and librarian session-close Step 2c. Mirrored into Logs/librarian-manifest.json -> doc_dependencies on each /librarian full run. Pattern matches drift-allowlist.json (Session 09). Ported to foundation-repo at Plan 81 SP03 T-28 (2026-05-12). Preserves live shape — cascade registry consumed by pre-write-guard.sh + librarian session-close + entity-parity capability.
generated_by: spine-remediation Session 10 (2026-04-13); ported to claude-stem foundation-repo at Plan 81 SP03 T-28 (2026-05-12)

schema_notes.rename_history: Plan 67 Sub-plan 02 T-3 (2026-04-22). Append-only audit trail of renames that have touched this entry's primary / mirrors[]. Each row: {"from": "<old-path>", "to": "<new-path>", "at": "<ISO8601>", "commit": "<sha>"}. Populated by rename-detect.sh at librarian session-close Step 2b. Forward-only: no historical backfill. Empty array means no known renames since instrumentation landed.

entries.rationale: Deny-list (block deliverables) rather than allow-list because scratch/operational concepts don't have first-class type values in vault-schema.json. type=log permitted explicitly; no-type scratch permitted implicitly. MVP: soft-warn; Session 13 may harden to deny.

mirrors.section: Directory Structure / Reference Material: Three Tiers
Frontmatter Standards / Pre-Write Validation / Plan Directory Conventions

entries.notes: Session 07 (2026-04-14) split VA.md into hub + 7 spokes. When writing to the hub, verify stub redirects still point at live spoke files. When writing to a spoke, verify the hub stub exists. max_lines: 400 on hub, 200 on most spokes, 250 on Frontmatter and Templates.
CLAUDE.md carries an abridged directory tree. The canonical tree lives in Vault Architecture - Structure.md. If top-level vault directories are added/removed, both must update.

vault-schema.json has 20 first-class keys (spine-remediation-followup Phase 1 extended from 15 → 19: added briefing, strategic, planning, archive; 56-spine-remediation-finalization Sub-plan 01 T-2 extended from 19 → 20: added historical-brief 2026-04-17). R-32 allowlist (pre-write-guard.sh lines 685-694, Tier 2 DENY) covers 25 values — 20 schema keys + 5 aliases (skill-spec, overview, updates, file-index, tier-2). post-write-verify.sh type_map matches the 25-value allowlist. daily-note remains path-inferred from Daily/ prefix. Any new type requires an R-37 lockstep commit (schema + pre-write-guard SCHEMA_KEY + pre-write-guard R-32 allowlist + post-write-verify type_map + vault CLAUDE.md + librarian SKILL.md, all in one commit).
Seeded by spine-remediation Session 12 (2026-04-14) when Personal Initiatives/ was created as a new top-level vault directory. First inhabitant: Claude Foundations/.

entities._comment: Entity parity registry. Each entity declares a canonical source path template with {name} placeholder, an instance-enumerator (glob/file-list/directory-index), the canonical field to compare, and mirrors with strict/presence-only flags. Consumed by librarian capability entity-parity.sh. Landed Plan 68 V1 (2026-04-21). V1 ships skill entity only; V2 adds plan + memory-file.

mirrors.notes: Vault design spec for the skill. Present for most runtime skills; absent for a minority of backend-only skills (enumeration at V1 closeout captured in handoff).
Master catalog row. Description column is paraphrased-by-design (summary, not mirror). V1 checks row presence only; content-match semantics deferred to V2.
Master backlog row. Single-line pointer per sentinel pattern; summary text is paraphrased. Presence-only check in V2.
Plan manifest. 12 of 38 plans predate the manifest convention, so mirror is optional; when present, top-level status must match spec frontmatter.
Backlog-progress satellite (sentinel pattern). Only exists for plans with session logs — 5 of 38 today — hence optional.
MEMORY.md index entry. Summary after em-dash is paraphrased for scan-readability. Presence-only check in V2.
